message:
🐛 Fix HardwareHealthCard to use clusterNameMap pattern (#580)

Apply the same deduplication pattern used by ClusterDetailModal and
ResourcesDrillDown to properly map raw cluster names to deduplicated
primary names.

Changes:
- Add useClusters hook and clusterNameMap to HardwareHealthCard
- Update deduplication logic to use clusterNameMap for cluster name mapping
- Revert agent device_tracker to use ListClusters (frontend handles dedup)

This ensures consistent cluster name display across all cards using the
centralized deduplication from useClusters().

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
